LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JEANIE GRAVES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C C P SECTION 4373 IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY PROVIDED THE COURT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE HEARING AND A STIPULATION AND ORDER TO VACATE THE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BOLDEN, JUDONDI SUBSTITUTED FOR ROSSOFF, MICHAEL SHERWOOD AS ATTORNEY FOR EL BETHEL ARMS A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
